items.title:
Mangakotukutuku College – Teacher Planning & Reflection Toolkit

Purpose: Reduce planning/admin time so kaiako can focus on building strong relationships with ākonga. These templates are lightweight, culturally safe, and aligned with NZC/NCEA.

How to use
- Copy any template from ./templates into your planning folder each term/week.
- Keep cultural safety at the forefront: complete the Cultural Safety Checklist before publishing materials.
- Log whānau engagement and reflections weekly; small habits compound.

Included templates
- Weekly Planner
- Lesson Plan Template
- Unit Plan Template
- Reflective Practice Log
- Whānau Engagement Log
- Cultural Safety Checklist
- NCEA Progress Tracker (CSV)
- Student Profile Snapshot

Kaitiaki notes
- Any content containing Māori contexts or local iwi references must be flagged for Kaitiaki review.
- If unsure, mark for review and proceed with care (he waka eke noa).

Cultural Safety Checklist (Complete before publishing)

- Language: Te reo used correctly (macrons, meaning) ☐
- Tikanga: Portrayals are respectful/accurate ☐
- Whakapapa: Connections and attributions retained ☐
- Local iwi: Context aligns or is flagged for review ☐
- Sensitive content: Marked for Kaitiaki review ☐
- Student safety: Inclusive, strengths-based framing ☐

- Local context/iwi alignment checked: Yes / Review

- Karakia/Settling (5)

- Independent/rotations (15–20)

7. Assessment / Evidence

8. Next Steps
